title: TigerShark
description:
磁场转动是漫画《海虎》和《武神》系列中的一种超能力，属于宇宙本源之力，是宇宙中必不可少的力量
Magnetic field rotation is a superpower in the manga series "Sea Tiger" and "God of War", belonging to the primordial force of the universe and an indispensable force in the universe.
body:
磁场转动由电流推动升华而来，通过高速摩擦细胞产生强劲磁场，可影响外界磁场。它并非内力，而是一种可修炼的超能力。
The rotation of the magnetic field is sublimated by the push of electric current, generating a strong magnetic field through high-speed friction against cells, which can affect the external magnetic field. It is not inner strength but a kind of superpower that can be cultivated.
海虎模组
模组中有游戏规则
一个是是否开启技能破坏地形，默认关闭
一个是是否开启功力死亡保留，默认关闭
目前生存玩法是找到村民，弄个图书管理员，有概率交易功法书，用功法书觉醒磁场能力
能量条可以抵挡伤害，伤害越高，扣的能量就越多，如果伤害超出能量便不能防御
完全境界可以提升伤害和流量恢复速度
匹数可以提升防御
流量上限和伤害挂钩
记得看按键，有轻功无设置默认按键，R键切换技能,G键释放技能
默认k键打开数据面板，shift＋k打开调试面板
现在有指令提升数值了，只需要输入/TigerSharkc
地形破坏关闭也有爆炸效果，爆炸也会有伤害
爆破拳挥拳可以产生爆破
调试工具🛠️，力量之源直接右键可以回满能量
新增加三件衣服，指令可调节磁场属性
/TigerSharkc @s add MagneticFieldRotation 0~99999

/TigerSharkc @s add PowerFlow 0~999999

/TigerSharkc @s add CompleteRealm 0~99999

/TigerSharkc @s del MagneticFieldRotation 0~99999

/TigerSharkc @s del PowerFlow 0~999999

/TigerSharkc @s del CompleteRealm 0~99999
Tiger Shark Mod
The module contains game rules.
One is whether to enable skill destruction of terrain, which is off by default.
The other is whether to enable retention of power after death, which is also off by default.
Currently, in the survival mode, you need to find villagers and get a librarian to have a chance to trade for power method books. Use the power method books to awaken the magnetic field ability.
The energy bar can absorb damage. The higher the damage, the more energy is deducted. If the damage exceeds the energy, it cannot be defended against.
The complete realm can increase damage and energy recovery speed.
Horsepower can increase defense.
The energy limit is linked to damage.
Remember to check the keys. If there is no lightness skill, the default keys are: R to switch skills, G to release skills.
The default key to open the data panel is K, and Shift + K to open the debug panel.
Now there are commands to increase values. Just input /TigerSharkc.
Even with terrain destruction off, there is still an explosion effect, and the explosion will cause damage.
The explosive punch can generate an explosion when swung.
Debug tool 🛠️, right-click on the power source to restore energy fully.
Three new clothes have been added, and the magnetic field attribute can be adjusted with commands.
